author: @everestchris6

title.en-US: this OpenClaw bot watches NASA wildfire satellites...
title.zh-CN: 一个 OpenClaw 机器人自动监控 NASA 卫星发现野火，然后给附近居民发定制防火升级明信片，承包商借此获客

summary.en-US: AI 技术应用 × 商业
summary.zh-CN: 所有人都在讨论 AI 替代人类工作，但这条推文真正揭示的是另一件事：AI 最强的能力不是替代执行，而是把「感知→行动」之间的延迟压缩到零。野火不会等你写提案，AI 也不应该等你手动触发。真正的竞争力不在自动化本身，在于你选择自动化的那个触发点。

relevance: AI 技术应用 × 商业

js_take.en-US: Three days between a fire starting and someone noticing. That delay was the whole business. This bot didn't replace a worker — it killed the gap.
js_take.zh-CN: Three days between a fire starting and someone noticing. That delay was the whole business. This bot didn't replace a worker — it killed the gap.

title.en-US: Anthropic banned OpenClaw 4 days ago, now launched their own agents platform
title.zh-CN: Anthropic 4天前禁止OpenClaw使用Claude订阅，今天推出了自己的托管agents平台—— basically OpenClaw但没有麻烦且更便宜。

summary.zh-CN: 原推呈现的是"Anthropic抄袭OpenClaw"的叙事，但这错过了更深层的模式：当生态位被证明有价值时，平台必然会收回边缘创新。这不是道德问题，而是结构问题——在别人的地基上盖房子，迟早要交租或搬离。真正的"无竞争"优势来自构建别人收不走的层面。

js_take.en-US: You built on their land and expected them to keep renting it to you. The lesson isn't 'corporations are evil'—it's that anything that can be copied and productized will be. The only real moat is the thing they can't package: judgment, context, relationships.
js_take.zh-CN: You built on their land and expected them to keep renting it to you. The lesson isn't 'corporations are evil'—it's that anything that can be copied and productized will be. The only real moat is the thing they can't package: judgment, context, relationships.

author: @thekitze

title.en-US: my experience with gpt 5.4 in openclaw - pls continue - yes pls do that... just pure pain
title.zh-CN: 作者在 OpenClaw 中使用 GPT 5.4 的经历充满痛苦 —— 不断重复「请继续」「请做我说的事」的循环。

summary.en-US: AI × 人生 — 工具使用中的控制幻觉
summary.zh-CN: 推文在吐槽 AI 不听话，但真相是：作者试图用「更具体的指令」解决「指令本身失效」的问题 —— 这是用踩油门的方式修刹车。当工具不理解你时，更多控制只会加剧失控。

relevance: AI × 人生 — 工具使用中的控制幻觉

js_take.en-US: You're not fighting the AI. You're fighting the illusion that more control will fix a broken steering wheel. Sometimes the move is to let go and see where it goes — then decide if you want to be there.
js_take.zh-CN: You're not fighting the AI. You're fighting the illusion that more control will fix a broken steering wheel. Sometimes the move is to let go and see where it goes — then decide if you want to be there.
